createHub.title: Create
createHub.question: What do you want to do?
createHub.subtitle: Track a workout now or share something that already happened.

resumeWorkout.title: Resume workout
resumeWorkout.detail: Return to the workout already in progress

workout.title: Start workout
workout.pickHint: Continue a saved workout or start freely by activity.

typeHints.run: In the app: GPS, pace and route
typeHints.walk: In the app: GPS and distance
typeHints.ride: In the app: GPS, speed and route

sets.title: Sets
sets.subtitle: Reps and load
sets.guideBody: Log each set. Workout controls tuck away while you type.
sets.emptyHint: Choose an exercise from the catalog to get started.
sets.failureWeightHint: Log the reps you reached at failure and the load used, if any.
sets.notePlaceholder: Form, discomfort or an adjustment for next time
sets.effortHint: RPE measures effort from 1 to 10. RIR is how many reps you still had in reserve.

saved.title: My workouts
saved.subtitle: Continue a saved workout
saved.emptyHint: Build a saved workout or start freely now.

planDetail.title: Workout progress
planDetail.empty: Complete this workout to start tracking your progress.

exerciseNote.title: Exercise note
exerciseNote.placeholder: Form, adjustment, or reminder for next time

reasons.weekday-pattern: You usually do this workout today
reasons.sequence-pattern: It is next in your sequence
reasons.frequent: One of your most frequent workouts
reasons.well-rested: You have not done it for a few days
reasons.no-history-recent: Starting with your most recent workout

finishConfirm.title: Finish this workout?
finishConfirm.description: You worked out for {{duration}}. You can add a caption, location and photos next.

shortWorkout.title: This workout was very short
shortWorkout.description: This workout lasted less than 2 minutes. Save it anyway?

discardConfirm.title: Discard this workout?
discardConfirm.description: The timer will be deleted and this workout won't count on your calendar.

errors.finish: Couldn't save the workout. Try again.
errors.finishTimeout: The connection took too long. Your workout is still saved on this iPhone; try finishing again.

summary.title: Workout complete
summary.streakKept: Day marked on your calendar · streak kept
summary.reviewHint: Review the result before sharing it with your Circle.
summary.notePlaceholder: Save how it felt, adjustments, or something to remember next time.
summary.noteHint: This note is saved to your workout history.
summary.noteError: We couldn't save it. Try again.

history.title: Exercise history
history.applied: Previous loads applied to empty fields.
history.empty: No previous records for this exercise.

workoutDetail.title: Workout details
workoutDetail.routeUnavailableDetail: This activity did not receive enough GPS points. Available metrics remain valid; no route was estimated.

workoutPlans.importHint: We read it on your device and you review it before saving.
workoutPlans.importPrivacy: The file never leaves your device.
workoutPlans.imported_one: 1 exercise found. Review it before saving.
workoutPlans.imported_other: {{count}} exercises found. Review them before saving.

importErrors.unsupported: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC image or a PDF.
importErrors.too_large: The file must be up to 25 MB so it won't freeze your phone.
importErrors.empty: We couldn't find text in this file.
importErrors.unreadable: We couldn't recognize the exercises. Try a sharper photo.

workoutPlans.renameHint: Choose a name that helps you find this workout.
workoutPlans.empty: You don't have any saved workouts yet. Create one to get started.

errors.save: We couldn't save this workout. Try again.
errors.delete: We couldn't delete this workout. Try again.

healthImport.title: Import from Apple Health
healthImport.subtitle: Apple Watch, Apple Fitness, and other apps that save workouts to Health.
healthImport.unsupportedDetail: Open the installed Gym Circle app on iPhone to import Apple Health workouts.
healthImport.permissionDetail: You choose what to share. Gym Circle only reads workouts, duration, distance, calories, heart rate, and route data you authorize.
healthImport.emptyDetail: There may be no recent workouts or access may be disabled. Check Gym Circle in Health > Sharing > Apps.
healthImport.reviewPrivacy: Only this workout will be saved to your Gym Circle history. Nothing is imported automatically.
healthImport.successDetail: Your {{source}} data is now in your history.

errors.permission: We couldn't open Apple Health authorization.
errors.denied: Access wasn't granted. You can change it later in the Health app.
errors.load: We couldn't load your Apple Health workouts.
errors.details: The detailed route isn't available, but you can still import the summary.
errors.timeout: Apple Health took too long to respond. The screen was released; try again.
errors.duplicate: This workout has already been imported to Gym Circle.
errors.import: We couldn't import this workout right now. Try again.
errors.integrate: The workout was imported but wasn't linked to the post. Tap Done and select it from the list.

workoutCatalog.chooseMuscle: Pick a muscle group and add an exercise.
workoutCatalog.emptyGroup: No exercises found in this group.
workoutCatalog.filtersHint: Refine the list without taking up space.
workoutCatalog.emptyFavorites: Favorite exercises to find them here.
workoutCatalog.emptyRecent: Your recent exercises will appear here.
workoutCatalog.translationPending: Some catalog content is still awaiting an English translation. The original catalog name is identified above.
workoutCatalog.loadError: We couldn't load the exercise library.
workoutCatalog.techniqueNotes: Details: e.g. 3 drops on the last set
workoutCatalog.videoSearchNotice: We'll open demonstration results; confirm the exercise before performing it.
workoutCatalog.communityConfirmBody: This exercise or technique does not exist yet. If you continue, it will be submitted to the community catalog and may be reviewed for other people.

personalRecords.title: Progress and records
personalRecords.subtitle: Your progress, history and personal bests.
personalRecords.emptyTitle: Your first record starts with your next workout
personalRecords.emptyBody: Log weighted exercises or complete a 5K or 10K run.
personalRecords.estimated: Time estimated from the workout's average pace.
personalRecords.rankingSubtitle: You and the people you follow.
personalRecords.rankingEmpty: There are no other marks to compare yet.
personalRecords.rankingError: We couldn't load the ranking right now.

progress.weeklyEmpty: Your workouts will build this chart week by week.
progress.muscleGroupsSubtitle: Set distribution over the last 84 days.
progress.noStrengthData: Your balance starts with your next workout
progress.muscleGroupsEmpty: Log sets to track which muscle groups you have been training.
progress.recentRecordsSubtitle: Your personal bests live alongside your history.
progress.historyEmptyTitle: Your history starts with your next workout
progress.historyEmptyBody: Complete sets to track weight, volume, reps and time by exercise.
progress.historyRangeHint: Recent history covers the last 84 days. Your personal records still use all-time data.

insights.title: Workout insights
insights.subtitle: Conservative guidance based only on what you logged.

progression.title: Consistent load
progression.body: You maintained {{weight}} kg across two comparable sessions and reached {{reps}} total reps.
progression.action: If your form feels solid, you may consider the next available increment.

muscle-gap.title: Muscle group not logged yet
muscle-gap.body: You haven't logged {{group}} this week. Last logged: {{date}}.

weekly.title: Weekly comparison
weekly.up: So far: {{current}} workouts, versus {{previous}} last week.
weekly.steady: So far you have maintained {{current}} workouts, matching last week.
weekly.down: So far: {{current}} workouts, versus {{previous}} last week.

learning.title: Learning from your workouts
learning.no-exercises: Complete sets so we can start recognizing your progress.
learning.insufficient-weighted-history: Log weight in at least two sessions of the same exercise to receive suggestions.
learning.collecting-comparable-sessions: Keep logging weight and reps. We only suggest progression when two sessions are truly comparable.

progress.moreData: Log {{metric}} in at least two workouts to see your progress.
progress.loadError: We couldn't load your progress right now.

integrateWorkout.title: Add a workout
integrateWorkout.subtitle: Add Cardio, Strength, Sauna, and other workouts from this day to the same post.
integrateWorkout.empty: All available workouts from this day have already been added.
integrateWorkout.integratedDetail: You can keep adding other workouts before closing.
integrateWorkout.error: This workout could not be added. Please try again.
integrateWorkout.importAppleHealthDetail: Authorize access and choose a workout from Apple Watch, Fitness, or another app.

empty.title: Your feed is quiet
empty.body: When your circle posts workouts, they'll show up here with streaks, likes, and comments.

error.title: Couldn't load the feed
error.body: Check your connection and try again.

post.shareEmpty: Follow people to send workouts via message.

empty.title: No comments yet
empty.detail: Start the conversation with a quick message.

myCircle.title: My Circle
myCircle.firstVisitHint: Welcome to your hub. Rings track your consistency (week / month / year). Badges are achievements. Calendar holds your monthly history — tap a photo to open that day's post.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.registerWorkout: Day {{day}} trained — log workout (add a photo)

competition.title: Competition
competition.emptyCircle: Follow people to compete in the ranking.
competition.emptyGlobal: No one scored this period yet.

pushPermission.title: Turn on notifications
pushPermission.body: Get updates about messages, likes, comments, and reminders to keep your Circle active.
pushPermission.foregroundBody: Tap to open in Gym Circle.
pushPermission.denied: Permission was denied. You can enable Gym Circle in Settings > Notifications.
pushPermission.unsupported: Notifications are not available in this installation.
pushPermission.failed: We couldn't register this iPhone right now. Try again in Settings.

language.title: Language
language.description: The app's language. Other users will always see the content you write as-is.

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Get alerts for likes, comments, and new followers on your phone.
push.enabled: Notifications are enabled on this iPhone.
push.denied: Permission was already denied on this iPhone. iOS will not show the prompt again: open Settings > Apps > Gym Circle > Notifications and enable Allow Notifications.
push.unsupported: This installation could not access iPhone notifications. Close and reopen the app; if it continues, update Gym Circle.
push.failed: The iPhone granted permission, but registration did not finish. Try again; the code below identifies the failed step.

privateAccount.title: Private account
privateAccount.description: Only people you approve see your workouts, stories, and My Circle. Current followers keep their access.

account.legalNote: Pausing hides your profile until you reactivate via email. Deleting is permanent.

profile.title: Profile

privateNotice.title: Private profile
privateNotice.body: Send a request to follow this circle from the inside.
privateNotice.restrictedBody: You don't have access to this content yet.

profile.emptyPostsTitle: Your workouts will show up here

featuredAchievements.title: Featured achievements
featuredAchievements.empty: Your achievements will show up here.

streakRestore.title: Restore streak?
streakRestore.body: Use 1 restore to save yesterday's missed day.

actions.become: Become a trainer on Gym Circle

onboarding.title: Organize your work in one place
onboarding.body: Your professional workspace will become the private foundation for your team, clients and workouts in future releases.
onboarding.scopeNotice: This release does not grant access to clients, activities or workouts owned by other people.

actions.createDescription: Set up the private foundation for your work

fields.name: Workspace name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: How do you present your work or team?

typeDescriptions.advisory: For a coaching team with shared organization in a future release.
typeDescriptions.studio: For a studio team or operation.

statusMessages.suspended: This workspace is suspended. Its data remains visible but cannot be changed.
statusMessages.archived: This workspace is archived and is available for reference only.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Professional workspace team
members.invitesLater: Invitations and role changes will ship in a future release with their own security rules.

errors.load: We could not load the professional workspace right now.
errors.save: We could not save the professional workspace. Try again.
errors.alreadyExists: You already own an active professional workspace.
errors.name: Enter a name between 2 and 100 characters.
errors.description: The description can have up to 800 characters.

verification.ownerPending: Your registration is under review. The Verified badge is hidden until the review is complete.
verification.ownerRejected: Your verification needs changes. You can correct the information and submit it again.
verification.ownerSuspended: Your professional profile is suspended and is not publicly visible.
verification.ownerUnverified: Professional profile not verified. Add your registration to request a review.

intro.title: Your work, with the Gym Circle identity
intro.body: Create your professional profile and get ready to support clients through Gym Circle.
intro.noticeTitle: Personal Trainer does not mean verified profile
intro.noticeBody: Your profile remains unverified until the review is complete. This first release does not include a client dashboard or workout assignments.

specialties.title: What are your specialties?
specialties.subtitle: Choose up to 5 areas to make your work clear.

registration.title: Professional registration
registration.subtitle: Optional in this release. Adding it starts a manual review and never verifies the profile automatically.
registration.privacy: The full number is visible only to you and the review team. It is never returned with the public profile.
registration.verifiedBody: Protected registration {{number}}. Future changes will use a secure re-review flow.

review.title: Review your profile
review.notice: By submitting, you confirm that the professional information is accurate. Gym Circle never grants the Verified badge automatically.

fields.headline: Headline
fields.headlinePlaceholder: Example: Simple and consistent hypertrophy coaching
fields.bioPlaceholder: Share your experience, approach and who your coaching is for.
fields.profilePublic: Show the professional section on my profile

errors.load: We could not load the professional profile right now.
errors.save: We could not save the professional profile. Try again.
errors.professional: Add a name, headline and a bio with at least 20 characters.
errors.headline: Add a professional headline.
errors.professionalBio: The professional bio needs at least 20 characters.
errors.registration: Add both registration number and region, or leave both empty.
errors.registrationPair: Add both registration number and region, or leave both empty.
errors.yearsExperience: Enter years of experience between 0 and 80.

orientation.rotateBody: Gym Circle works in portrait mode. Turn your phone upright to continue.

subtitle.signIn: Sign in and jump straight into the feed.
subtitle.signUp: Quick signup: email, password, username. The rest can wait.
subtitle.forgotPassword: Enter your registered email to receive a reset link.

errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.legalRequired: You must accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.

legal.checkbox: I have read and accept the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

feedback.resetSent: We sent you a password reset email. Open the link to confirm.
feedback.signupConfirm: Account created. If the app doesn't open now, confirm your email.

avatar.hint: Tap the camera to change your photo.

username.label: Username (@)
username.errorTooShort: username must be at least 3 valid characters

gym.label: Gym
gym.searchHint: Search by name or use current location
gym.errorLocationRequired: To register a gym, its location is required.

privacy.privateBody: People who want to follow you must send a request. Only approved followers see your posts.
privacy.publicBody: Anyone can follow you and see the photo of your latest workout.

activity.title: Workout complete — {{type}} · {{elapsed}}
activity.notice: Day marked on your calendar and streak kept. Even without a photo, it publishes as a full post — with likes, comments, and a map when there is a route.

steps.mediaReadyHint: Upload complete. Now add the details.
steps.activityNoMediaHint: Add a caption and details, or go back to include photos and videos.
steps.checkinNoMediaHint: Choose the location on the next step. You can go back and add photos.

registerWorkout.title: Workout on {{date}}
registerWorkout.notice: You trained on {{date}}. Add a photo/video to fill that day on your calendar.
registerWorkout.hint: Goes only to your calendar/profile on {{date}} (won't show at the top of the feed).

media.emptyHint: Add a photo or video of the workout

tagFriends.label: Tag friends
tagFriends.streakNote: The tag only counts toward streak after the person accepts.

location.label: Location
location.gymMetaFallback: Only the name will be shown on the post.
location.currentNote: Your post only shows an approximate location.

errors.needsCoordinates: To register a gym, its location is required.

destinations.label: Where to post
destinations.hintBoth: Goes to feed and to story (24h)
destinations.hintNone: Pick a destination in More options

errors.needsMedia: Pick a photo or video to publish.
errors.needsDestination: Pick at least one destination: feed or story.
errors.needsGym: Pick a registered gym or remove the location.
errors.needsCurrentLocation: Allow GPS, try again, or remove the location before posting.
errors.coverFailed: Couldn't generate the workout cover. Try adding a photo or publishing again.

empty.noUsersDetail: To start a conversation, you need to know the @username.
empty.noConversationsDetail: Search for an @username or create a group to plan a workout.

groupComposer.prompt: Search for an @username to add people.

emptyThread.title: Start the conversation
emptyThread.detail: Send a message or media to plan a workout.

postMenu.deleteCheckinDescription: This can't be undone. The check-in will be removed from the feed and that day's streak will be recalculated.
postMenu.deleteActivityDescription: This can't be undone. The workout will be removed from the feed and that day's streak will be recalculated.

empty.title: No likes yet
empty.detail: When someone likes your workout, they show up here.

followers.title: Followers
followers.emptyDetail: When someone follows you, they show up here.

following.title: Following
following.detail: People who appear in your circle
following.emptyDetail: Follow people to make your feed more alive.

empty.title: All clear
empty.detail: When someone likes your workouts, follows you, or tags you, it shows up here.

postTag.accepted: Tag accepted. This post now appears on your profile.

storyTag.accepted: Tag accepted. This story now appears on your profile.

distance.title: Show approximate distance
distance.hint: We only show approximate km. Your coordinates don't appear in the feed.

empty.noResultsDetail: No match for "{{query}}". Check the username.
empty.adminHint: As admin, you can see all registered profiles.
empty.regularHint: To find someone, you need to know their @username.

empty.title: Where are you training?
empty.hint: Tag the place to see who else is here and check in.

detail.emptyToday: No posts from here today. Be the first.

errors.needsCoordinates: To register a gym, its location is required.

monthlyChallenges.title: {{month}} challenges

historyError.title: We couldn't load the full history.

achievementsSheet.title: Hall of Fame

categoryDescription.epic: Epic feats. Few make it here.
categoryDescription.legendary: The rarest challenges in Gym Circle.

achievementDetail.title: Achievement

achievementDetail.rarityPercent: Only {{percent}} of users own this achievement.
achievementDetail.onlyEarner: You are the first to earn this!
achievementDetail.nobodyYet: Nobody has earned this yet. Be the first!

empty.next: All caught up! Keep training and more will come.
